brandStory.statement:
Picture this: a wardrobe built on timeless, quality essentials.
Fewer, better items.
brandStory.body: Quality over quantity. We make a small, considered range of linen and essential pieces — breathable, understated, and built to be worn for years, not seasons. Premium craftsmanship, ordered directly, without the premium markup.
brandStory.imageAlt: Behind the scenes — models in linen, warm natural light

productCard.dutiesNote: Island delivery across Mauritius · Custom sizing on request

accordion.title: Details
accordion.body: Premium linen, cut for relaxed, put-together ease. A breathable everyday essential, better with every wear. Available in our limited island palette.

accordion.title: Size & Fit
accordion.body: True-to-size, relaxed cut. Sizes S–XL. Custom sizing and colour requests are welcome — message us on WhatsApp.

accordion.title: Shipping & Delivery
accordion.body: Island delivery across Mauritius. For delivery times, custom orders or pre-orders, reach us on WhatsApp at +230 5910 2655.

productCard.preorderIntro: Tell us where to reach you and we'll confirm your pre-order on WhatsApp 59102655.

productCard.checkoutManualNote: Final payment is arranged via the store's manual method or on WhatsApp — we'll confirm before any charge.

wings.title: The Gentleman's Wing
wings.note: Linen shirts, tailored trousers and knit layers — the foundation of a considered wardrobe.

wings.imageAlt: Women's wing — ivory linen, full-length mirror, backlit marble

about.manifesto: Dolce Attires began with a simple idea: that you need fewer things, made better. We design a small, considered range of linen essentials in Mauritius — breathable, understated, and built to last.

sections.title: Made for the island
sections.body: We started where we live — on a warm island where linen makes sense. What began as a few well-made shirts shared between friends became a quiet pursuit of the perfect everyday essential. No middleman, no markup, no noise. Just pieces we'd want to wear ourselves.
sections.imageAlt: Dolce Attires editorial — linen in natural light

sections.title: Fewer, better items. Quality over quantity.
sections.body: We believe luxury isn't loud. It's the quiet confidence of something made well, worn often, and loved for years.

sections.title: Premium linen, considered cuts
sections.body: Every piece is cut for relaxed, put-together ease and made from premium linen chosen for the island's warm days — light, durable, and better with every wear. Sizes S–XL, with custom sizing and colour requests always welcome.

sections.title: Direct, fair, and built to last
sections.body: Premium pieces at accessible island pricing, ordered directly from us. We stand behind every garment — and we're a WhatsApp message away if anything isn't right.

contact.heading: Get in touch
contact.body: The quickest way to order or ask anything is a message. We reply personally — sizes, colours, custom pieces and pre-orders all start here.

form.successBody: Thank you — we'll reply personally, usually within a day.
form.errorMessage: Something went wrong. Please try again, or reach us on WhatsApp.

faqs.a: Our pieces run S–XL with a true-to-size, relaxed cut. Custom sizing is available on request — just message us on WhatsApp.
We deliver across Mauritius. For delivery times and arrangements, reach us on WhatsApp at +230 5910 2655.
Choose your colour and size and place a pre-order — we'll confirm availability and arrange everything personally by email or WhatsApp before any payment.

faqs.q: What are your pieces made from?
faqs.a: Premium linen, chosen for breathability and durability in the island's warm climate. Light, relaxed, and better with every wear.

faqs.q: How do I care for linen?
faqs.a: Wash cool, hang or lay flat to dry, and a warm iron brings it back to life. Linen softens beautifully over time.

cart.heading: Your Bag
cart.emptyBody: Explore the collection and add a few considered pieces.
cart.whatsappNote: For custom orders or pre-orders, message us on WhatsApp 59102655.
cart.errorMessage: We couldn't update your bag just now — please try again.

checkout.heading: Checkout
checkout.trustBody: All transactions are secure and encrypted. You'll complete payment securely on our checkout partner — no card is charged on this page.
checkout.manualNote: Payment is arranged via the store's manual method or on WhatsApp — we'll confirm everything before any charge.
checkout.successBody: Thank you — we'll confirm the details by email or WhatsApp shortly.
checkout.errorMessage: We're finalising secure online checkout. To complete your order now, message us on WhatsApp 59102655 — we'll confirm everything and arrange payment.
